mapper.select: SELECT * FROM guide_version WHERE is_active=1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM guide_version ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guide_version(version_name, description, is_active) VALUES (#{versionName}, #{description}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE guide_version SET version_name=#{versionName}, description=#{description}, is_active=#{isActive} WHERE id=#{id}
